title: Uruguayan-Style Grilled Choripan
description: A classic Uruguayan street food, choripan consists of grilled chorizo sausage served on a crusty bun with chimichurri sauce and salsa criolla. This version adds a spicy kick and smoky flavor.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan chorizo sausage
ingredients.notes: Look for chorizo sausage with a smoky flavor

ingredients.name: treacle (molasses)
ingredients.notes: For a sweet and sticky glaze

ingredients.name: grill
ingredients.notes: For grilling the chorizo and bread

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the chorizo sausages for 5-7 minutes per side, or until nicely charred.
3. Grill the bread buns for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
4. Meanwhile, mix together the spicy chimichurri sauce and treacle in a small bowl.
5. Slather the chimichurri-treacle mixture onto the grilled bread buns.
6. Slice the grilled chorizo sausages and place on top of the buns.
7. Drizzle with salsa criolla and serve immediately.
